programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: Kendra Wilkinson, Lil Jon, Carole Radziwill
programme.desc: Tyler delivers Kendra Wilkinson news from the other side about the future of her family.

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Arbitration show in which real small-claims cases are adjudicated over within a studio courtroom by Judge Robert Rinder.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle and Dorit surprise Teddi with a baby shower, but Brandi reveals a few surprises of her own. Denise and Garcelle lament over how they think Lisa has changed.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman purchased a truck she found online from the defendant. She discovered several months after the sale that the truck was stolen. However, the defendant insists that he owned the vehicle for 10 years.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Guests include Adam Brody, Gaten Matarazzo, Mark Messier and musical guest Courtney Barnett.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Denise is a no-show at Dorit's housewarming party and fails to keep plans with Garcelle twice in one week. The group hops on a private jet to celebrate Erika's Broadway debut.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Newly single Josh Flagg plays mentor to a teenage buyer with an eight million dollar budget. Meanwhile, Josh Altman's domination of the Bird Streets continues.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Danielle Milian visits the doctors to fix her scarred stomach and popped implant, while a police officer wants her pig nose gone so she can look like her twin again.

programme.title: Death Row Confidential
programme.desc: Retired Detective Ken Mains and inmate Bill Noguera uncover chilling new details about serial killer Joseph Nasowho posed as a pro baseball team's photographer to hunt women and may have gone on a kil.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When police discover two murdered lovers in East Harlem, a stolen phone leads them on a journey into the heart of a criminal underground.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A concerned father in Arkansas reports his son missing, launching an investigation that would unearth a dark network of lies and a horrific discovery more deadly than police ever imagined.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: When a young mother, her daughter and a friend vanish after a visit with extended family, those close to the victims suspect foul play.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Danielle Milian visits the doctors to fix her scarred stomach and popped implant, while a police officer wants her pig nose gone so she can look like her twin again.

programme.title: Death Row Confidential
programme.desc: Retired Detective Ken Mains and inmate Bill Noguera uncover chilling new details about serial killer Joseph Nasowho posed as a pro baseball team's photographer to hunt women and may have gone on a kil.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When police discover two murdered lovers in East Harlem, a stolen phone leads them on a journey into the heart of a criminal underground.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A concerned father in Arkansas reports his son missing, launching an investigation that would unearth a dark network of lies and a horrific discovery more deadly than police ever imagined.

programme.desc: Denise is a no-show at Dorit's housewarming party and fails to keep plans with Garcelle twice in one week. The group hops on a private jet to celebrate Erika's Broadway debut.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman purchased a truck she found online from the defendant. She discovered several months after the sale that the truck was stolen. However, the defendant insists that he owned the vehicle for 10 years.

programme.desc: Newly single Josh Flagg plays mentor to a teenage buyer with an eight million dollar budget. Meanwhile, Josh Altman's domination of the Bird Streets continues.

programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.desc: Denise is a no-show at Dorit's housewarming party and fails to keep plans with Garcelle twice in one week. The group hops on a private jet to celebrate Erika's Broadway debut.

programme.desc: Newly single Josh Flagg plays mentor to a teenage buyer with an eight million dollar budget. Meanwhile, Josh Altman's domination of the Bird Streets continues.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: Corey Feldman, Rachel Hunter, Evelyn Lozada
programme.desc: Tyler brings Rachel Hunter's deceased trailblazing grandmother through to offer encouragement and peace.

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Arbitration show in which real small-claims cases are adjudicated over within a studio courtroom by Judge Robert Rinder.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Denise is a no-show at Dorit's housewarming party and fails to keep plans with Garcelle twice in one week. The group hops on a private jet to celebrate Erika's Broadway debut.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiffs claim they agreed to lend the defendant money to support a fellow minority business owner but they now feel duped as the business is no longer in open and the defendant is not repaying.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Guests include Jennifer Lopez, EJAE, Audrey Nuna and Rei Ami from KPop Demon Hunters and musical guests EJAE, Audrey Nuna and Rei Ami from KPop Demon Hunters.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: After months in isolation, the friends glam it up for a Beverly Hills barbecue at Dorit's house. Kyle's sister, Kathy Hilton, introduces the group to Crystal Minkoff.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Old rivalries rear their ugly head when Josh Flagg's teenage client falls for Josh Altman's multi-million dollar listing in the Bird Streets.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: On the road in Montana, the doctors take a mancation, fly-fishing in the great outdoors, and also check in on a woman who had a horrific motorcycle accident.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle and Mauricio speak face-to-face for the first time since he was photographed with another woman. While Boz and her boyfriend try to strengthen their relationship, Dorit and PK try to decide wheth.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Miami
programme.desc: Larsa moves into her new house. Alexia and Todd near their divorce deadline. Jody gives Lisa an ultimatum for a proposal. Adriana hosts an Art Basel event, but she starts seeing red after discovering.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A doting grandmother alerts police when she recognizes her daughter's dead body on the evening news, triggering an investigation that proves blood isn't always thicker than water.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.sub-title: Murder at the Long Branch Saloon
programme.desc: A bar owner's body is discovered in a quarry pond. His killer remains a mystery to investigators for years while his increasingly divided family fears one of them must be the murderer.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: On the road in Montana, the doctors take a mancation, fly-fishing in the great outdoors, and also check in on a woman who had a horrific motorcycle accident.

programme.desc: Kyle and Mauricio speak face-to-face for the first time since he was photographed with another woman. While Boz and her boyfriend try to strengthen their relationship, Dorit and PK try to decide wheth.
